bug.description: type confusion where a pointer is cast to an incompatible struct type

prompt:
There is a type confusion where a pointer is cast to an incompatible struct type downstream of function rlc_um_reception_actions in the openair2/LAYER2/rlc_v2 subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/LAYER2/rlc_v2/rlc_entity_um.c:198.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
